case_title: REEVES & ASSOCIATES, A PLC VS. DANILO NAVARRO

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO FEB-06-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-06-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT NAVARRO, DANILO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REEVES & ASSOCIATES, A PLC AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRO, DANILO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-14-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONTINUED FOR DISMISSAL AFTER DECEMBER 4, 2012, DATE LAST PAYMENT IS DUE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT THROUGH MEDIATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REEVES & ASSOCIATES, A PLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAVARRO, DANILO $1,503.09 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,563.09 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY STEVEN J. MALM.--ASSOCIATE ATTORNEY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY REEVES & ASSOCIATES, A PLC AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRO, DANILO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF OF NON SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF REEVES & ASSOCIATES, A PLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - RETURN TO SENDER UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD - COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRO, DANILO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REEVES & ASSOCIATES, A PLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.
